# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:latest

RUN apk add --no-cache curl

# Install Docker CLI
COPY --from=docker:latest /usr/local/bin/docker /usr/local/bin/docker

# Set the working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy the orchestration service code
COPY . .

# Expose the necessary port for the orchestration service
EXPOSE 8080

# Entry point for the orchestration service
CMD ["./your_orchestration_service_executable"]

# To run the container with access to the host's Docker daemon, use:
# docker run -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --privileged your_orchestration_service_image
